_comment: Per-language runner manifest. One entry per target language. `cmd` + `args` are how the harness invokes that language's ~15-line CLI runner; path-args (those containing '/') resolve relative to THIS file's directory. Each runner reads vector `input` lines from stdin and prints one result line per input to stdout — and MUST honor the CONFORMANCE_BREAK=1 env var by loading a deliberately-broken impl (so the negative control can go RED). Copy this to <corpus-dir>/runners.json and edit.
